title: Customisable Graphs Text
excerpt: Would it be possible to allow us to change the colours of graphs, the size of the text, the text colour, and the font, on the X and Y axis?

posts.author: salih (Salih)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would it be possible to allow us to change the colours of graphs, the size of the text, the text colour, and the font, on the X and Y axis?

image1857×832 33.5 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @salih,

I am afraid this level of customisation isn’t currently possible, but I certainly hear where you’re coming from here. Would you be happy to submit this as a feature request so our community can add their vote?
